slides.title: PhD CET Mock Exam 4 - Computer Science
slides.subtitle: 50 Practice MCQs for Doctoral Entrance Examination • Topic 1-5

slides.question: Q1: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Vertex Degree**?
options: Its primary focus is many-to-one signal selector.
Its primary focus is floating-point binary representation format.
Its primary focus is vertex incident edge count.
Its primary focus is shared instruction-data bus architecture.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Vertex Degree** is: **vertex incident edge count**.

slides.question: Q2: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Euler Path**?
options: Its primary focus is single-visit edge traversal trail.
Its primary focus is one-to-many signal router.
Its primary focus is compound proposition builders.
Its primary focus is multi-level fast memory staging.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Euler Path** is: **single-visit edge traversal trail**.

slides.question: Q3: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Hamiltonian Cycle**?
options: Its primary focus is single-visit vertex traversal loop.
Its primary focus is cpu-free I/O-memory transfer.
Its primary focus is predicate variable scoping symbols.
Its primary focus is three-input binary addition circuit.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Hamiltonian Cycle** is: **single-visit vertex traversal loop**.

slides.question: Q4: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Group Theory Group**?
options: Its primary focus is instruction pipeline execution stalls.
Its primary focus is clock-driven sequential memory components.
Its primary focus is closure-associativity-identity-inverse algebraic structure.
Its primary focus is set manipulation mathematical operations.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Group Theory Group** is: **closure-associativity-identity-inverse algebraic structure**.

slides.question: Q5: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Permutation**?
options: Its primary focus is partitioning reflexive-symmetric-transitive relation.
Its primary focus is order-sensitive selection arrangement.
Its primary focus is simultaneously-clocked state counter.
Its primary focus is fetch-decode-execute basic loop.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Permutation** is: **order-sensitive selection arrangement**.

slides.question: Q6: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Boolean Algebra Minimization**?
options: Its primary focus is reflexive-antisymmetric-transitive ordering framework.
Its primary focus is reduced uniform instruction set design.
Its primary focus is binary-to-unary line converter.
Its primary focus is logic gate reduction optimization.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Boolean Algebra Minimization** is: **logic gate reduction optimization**.

slides.question: Q7: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Karnaugh Map (K-map)**?
options: Its primary focus is shared instruction-data bus architecture.
Its primary focus is floating-point binary representation format.
Its primary focus is graphical boolean simplification table.
Its primary focus is vertex incident edge count.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Karnaugh Map (K-map)** is: **graphical boolean simplification table**.

slides.question: Q8: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Multiplexer (MUX)**?
options: Its primary focus is many-to-one signal selector.
Its primary focus is single-visit edge traversal trail.
Its primary focus is multi-level fast memory staging.
Its primary focus is compound proposition builders.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Multiplexer (MUX)** is: **many-to-one signal selector**.

slides.question: Q9: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Demultiplexer (DEMUX)**?
options: Its primary focus is single-visit vertex traversal loop.
Its primary focus is one-to-many signal router.
Its primary focus is predicate variable scoping symbols.
Its primary focus is cpu-free I/O-memory transfer.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Demultiplexer (DEMUX)** is: **one-to-many signal router**.

slides.question: Q10: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Full Adder**?
options: Its primary focus is instruction pipeline execution stalls.
Its primary focus is three-input binary addition circuit.
Its primary focus is set manipulation mathematical operations.
Its primary focus is closure-associativity-identity-inverse algebraic structure.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Full Adder** is: **three-input binary addition circuit**.

slides.question: Q11: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Paging**?
options: Its primary focus is variable-based process signaling.
Its primary focus is peripheral device print job spooler.
Its primary focus is elimination of external fragmentation.
Its primary focus is privileged kernel service requests interface.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Paging** is: **elimination of external fragmentation**.

slides.question: Q12: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Virtual Memory**?
options: Its primary focus is logical memory expansion.
Its primary focus is cpu state saving-restoring overhead.
Its primary focus is process lifecycle stage indicators.
Its primary focus is redundancy-performance disk array configurations.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Virtual Memory** is: **logical memory expansion**.

slides.question: Q13: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Translation Lookaside Buffer (TLB)**?
options: Its primary focus is minimal kernel user-space service design.
Its primary focus is ready queue CPU allocation.
Its primary focus is fast page table lookup cache.
Its primary focus is isolated process communication mechanisms.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Translation Lookaside Buffer (TLB)** is: **fast page table lookup cache**.

slides.question: Q14: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Page Replacement Algorithm**?
options: Its primary focus is multiprocessor cache synchronization.
Its primary focus is physical memory page eviction policy.
Its primary focus is prevention of race conditions.
Its primary focus is speed-matching data storage buffer.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Page Replacement Algorithm** is: **physical memory page eviction policy**.

slides.question: Q15: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Thrashing**?
options: Its primary focus is excessive paging performance collapse.
Its primary focus is logical module-based memory division.
Its primary focus is hard drive head seek optimization.
Its primary focus is coffman condition elimination strategy.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Thrashing** is: **excessive paging performance collapse**.

slides.question: Q16: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Thread**?
options: Its primary focus is lightweight shared-memory execution unit.
Its primary focus is safe-state resource allocation simulator.
Its primary focus is physical disk block mapping strategies.
Its primary focus is hardware-specific control translator program.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Thread** is: **lightweight shared-memory execution unit**.

slides.question: Q17: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Mutex**?
options: Its primary focus is peripheral device print job spooler.
Its primary focus is single-thread resource lock.
Its primary focus is privileged kernel service requests interface.
Its primary focus is elimination of external fragmentation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Mutex** is: **single-thread resource lock**.

slides.question: Q18: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Counting Semaphore**?
options: Its primary focus is process lifecycle stage indicators.
Its primary focus is logical memory expansion.
Its primary focus is redundancy-performance disk array configurations.
Its primary focus is variable-based process signaling.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Counting Semaphore** is: **variable-based process signaling**.

slides.question: Q19: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Context Switching**?
options: Its primary focus is fast page table lookup cache.
Its primary focus is minimal kernel user-space service design.
Its primary focus is ready queue CPU allocation.
Its primary focus is cpu state saving-restoring overhead.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Context Switching** is: **cpu state saving-restoring overhead**.

slides.question: Q20: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Inter-Process Communication (IPC)**?
options: Its primary focus is prevention of race conditions.
Its primary focus is multiprocessor cache synchronization.
Its primary focus is physical memory page eviction policy.
Its primary focus is isolated process communication mechanisms.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Inter-Process Communication (IPC)** is: **isolated process communication mechanisms**.

slides.question: Q21: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **AVL Tree**?
options: Its primary focus is strictly balanced binary search tree.
Its primary focus is FIFO element storage collection.
Its primary focus is retrieving value from pointer address.
Its primary focus is name accessibility region code boundary.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **AVL Tree** is: **strictly balanced binary search tree**.

slides.question: Q22: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Quick Sort**?
options: Its primary focus is one-way pointer node sequence.
Its primary focus is single interface multi-implementation capability.
Its primary focus is O(log n) average search time.
Its primary focus is in-place sorting with O(n log n) average time.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Quick Sort** is: **in-place sorting with O(n log n) average time**.

slides.question: Q23: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Adjacency List**?
options: Its primary focus is derived-to-base class reuse mechanism.
Its primary focus is single-source shortest path optimization.
Its primary focus is two-way pointer node sequence.
Its primary focus is space-efficient sparse graph representation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Adjacency List** is: **space-efficient sparse graph representation**.

slides.question: Q24: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Breadth-First Search (BFS)**?
options: Its primary focus is memoization and tabulation paradigm.
Its primary focus is shortest path in unweighted graphs.
Its primary focus is O(n log n) stable comparison sort.
Its primary focus is data-hiding and modular unit bundling.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Breadth-First Search (BFS)** is: **shortest path in unweighted graphs**.

slides.question: Q25: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Depth-First Search (DFS)**?
options: Its primary focus is connectivity and topological sorting tool.
Its primary focus is mathematical operation behavior model.
Its primary focus is O(log n) sorted array search.
Its primary focus is O(1) average lookup complexity.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Depth-First Search (DFS)** is: **connectivity and topological sorting tool**.

slides.question: Q26: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Big O Complexity**?
options: Its primary focus is asymptotic run-time upper bound indicator.
Its primary focus is automatic dead heap memory reclamation.
Its primary focus is active subroutine memory tracker.
Its primary focus is efficient priority queue implementation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Big O Complexity** is: **asymptotic run-time upper bound indicator**.

slides.question: Q27: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Stack Data Structure**?
options: Its primary focus is name accessibility region code boundary.
Its primary focus is strictly balanced binary search tree.
Its primary focus is retrieving value from pointer address.
Its primary focus is LIFO element storage collection.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Stack Data Structure** is: **LIFO element storage collection**.

slides.question: Q28: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Queue Data Structure**?
options: Its primary focus is O(log n) average search time.
Its primary focus is in-place sorting with O(n log n) average time.
Its primary focus is FIFO element storage collection.
Its primary focus is single interface multi-implementation capability.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Queue Data Structure** is: **FIFO element storage collection**.

slides.question: Q29: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Singly Linked List**?
options: Its primary focus is single-source shortest path optimization.
Its primary focus is space-efficient sparse graph representation.
Its primary focus is one-way pointer node sequence.
Its primary focus is derived-to-base class reuse mechanism.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Singly Linked List** is: **one-way pointer node sequence**.

slides.question: Q30: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Doubly Linked List**?
options: Its primary focus is shortest path in unweighted graphs.
Its primary focus is memoization and tabulation paradigm.
Its primary focus is two-way pointer node sequence.
Its primary focus is data-hiding and modular unit bundling.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Doubly Linked List** is: **two-way pointer node sequence**.

slides.question: Q31: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Foreign Key**?
options: Its primary focus is unnecessary duplicate data storage.
Its primary focus is logical database structure visualization.
Its primary focus is referential integrity constraint.
Its primary focus is efficient execution plan selector.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Foreign Key** is: **referential integrity constraint**.

slides.question: Q32: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **B+ Tree Index**?
options: Its primary focus is automatic event-driven code block.
Its primary focus is disk-optimized indexing structure.
Its primary focus is atomic column values requirement.
Its primary focus is reverting uncommitted transactional modifications.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **B+ Tree Index** is: **disk-optimized indexing structure**.

slides.question: Q33: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Two-Phase Locking (2PL)**?
options: Its primary focus is precompiled database SQL package.
Its primary focus is serializability guarantee in transactions.
Its primary focus is elimination of partial dependencies.
Its primary focus is concurrent write overwrite anomaly.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Two-Phase Locking (2PL)** is: **serializability guarantee in transactions**.

slides.question: Q34: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **SQL JOIN**?
options: Its primary focus is multi-table data retrieval operation.
Its primary focus is row unique identifier constraint.
Its primary focus is elimination of transitive dependencies.
Its primary focus is reading uncommitted transaction modifications.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **SQL JOIN** is: **multi-table data retrieval operation**.

slides.question: Q35: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Relational Algebra**?
options: Its primary focus is reading committed concurrent modifications.
Its primary focus is eliminating overlapping candidate key anomalies.
Its primary focus is theoretical query language foundation.
Its primary focus is minimal row identifier set.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Relational Algebra** is: **theoretical query language foundation**.

slides.question: Q36: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Database View**?
options: Its primary focus is valid foreign-to-primary key reference state.
Its primary focus is virtual table query abstraction.
Its primary focus is reading committed concurrent insertions.
Its primary focus is transaction reliability standards.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Database View** is: **virtual table query abstraction**.

slides.question: Q37: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **NoSQL Database**?
options: Its primary focus is non-relational schema-less storage.
Its primary focus is efficient execution plan selector.
Its primary focus is referential integrity constraint.
Its primary focus is unnecessary duplicate data storage.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **NoSQL Database** is: **non-relational schema-less storage**.

slides.question: Q38: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **ER Modeling**?
options: Its primary focus is automatic event-driven code block.
Its primary focus is atomic column values requirement.
Its primary focus is disk-optimized indexing structure.
Its primary focus is logical database structure visualization.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **ER Modeling** is: **logical database structure visualization**.

slides.question: Q39: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Transaction Rollback**?
options: Its primary focus is precompiled database SQL package.
Its primary focus is elimination of partial dependencies.
Its primary focus is reverting uncommitted transactional modifications.
Its primary focus is serializability guarantee in transactions.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Transaction Rollback** is: **reverting uncommitted transactional modifications**.

slides.question: Q40: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Lost Update Anomaly**?
options: Its primary focus is concurrent write overwrite anomaly.
Its primary focus is elimination of transitive dependencies.
Its primary focus is row unique identifier constraint.
Its primary focus is multi-table data retrieval operation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Lost Update Anomaly** is: **concurrent write overwrite anomaly**.

slides.question: Q41: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Asymmetric Encryption**?
options: Its primary focus is isolated component validation.
Its primary focus is public-private key pair cryptography.
Its primary focus is improving code quality without behavior change.
Its primary focus is sprint-based team collaboration.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Asymmetric Encryption** is: **public-private key pair cryptography**.

slides.question: Q42: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **DNS (Domain Name System)**?
options: Its primary focus is single module functional focus score.
Its primary focus is distributed source control management.
Its primary focus is 7-layer abstraction framework.
Its primary focus is internet address resolution directory.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **DNS (Domain Name System)** is: **internet address resolution directory**.

slides.question: Q43: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **ARP (Address Resolution Protocol)**?
options: Its primary focus is automated deployment automation.
Its primary focus is IP to MAC address resolver.
Its primary focus is reliable internet transport framework.
Its primary focus is inter-module interdependence indicator.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **ARP (Address Resolution Protocol)** is: **IP to MAC address resolver**.

slides.question: Q44: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Firewall**?
options: Its primary focus is traffic filtering barrier.
Its primary focus is software development process model.
Its primary focus is IP address segmentation tool.
Its primary focus is functional specification validation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Firewall** is: **traffic filtering barrier**.

slides.question: Q45: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **IPv6 Address Space**?
options: Its primary focus is 128-bit internet address space standard.
Its primary focus is internal code path validation.
Its primary focus is internet autonomous routing protocol.
Its primary focus is standardized software visualization diagrams.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **IPv6 Address Space** is: **128-bit internet address space standard**.

slides.question: Q46: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Agile Methodology**?
options: Its primary focus is high-level structural system organization.
Its primary focus is single shared-key cryptography.
Its primary focus is formal software requirements specifications.
Its primary focus is flexible iterative development paradigm.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Agile Methodology** is: **flexible iterative development paradigm**.

slides.question: Q47: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Design Pattern**?
options: Its primary focus is public-private key pair cryptography.
Its primary focus is sprint-based team collaboration.
Its primary focus is reusable architectural solution blueprint.
Its primary focus is improving code quality without behavior change.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Design Pattern** is: **reusable architectural solution blueprint**.

slides.question: Q48: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Unit Testing**?
options: Its primary focus is single module functional focus score.
Its primary focus is internet address resolution directory.
Its primary focus is 7-layer abstraction framework.
Its primary focus is isolated component validation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Unit Testing** is: **isolated component validation**.

slides.question: Q49: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Git Version Control**?
options: Its primary focus is IP to MAC address resolver.
Its primary focus is distributed source control management.
Its primary focus is reliable internet transport framework.
Its primary focus is inter-module interdependence indicator.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Git Version Control** is: **distributed source control management**.

slides.question: Q50: In computer systems, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **CI/CD Pipeline**?
options: Its primary focus is traffic filtering barrier.
Its primary focus is IP address segmentation tool.
Its primary focus is automated deployment automation.
Its primary focus is software development process model.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **CI/CD Pipeline** is: **automated deployment automation**.
